scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.build:clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('.tsbuildinfo',{force:true}); fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true});" && npm run build
scripts.build:main: node ../scripts/generate-desktop-service-overrides.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const main='dist/main/desktop/electron/main.js'; if(!fs.existsSync(main)){ throw new Error('missing desktop main output: '+main); } fs.mkdirSync('dist/main/desktop/electron',{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('electron/preload.cjs','dist/main/desktop/electron/preload.cjs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/main/desktop/build',{recursive:true}); if(fs.existsSync('build/tray-icon.png')){ fs.copyFileSync('build/tray-icon.png','dist/main/desktop/electron/tray-icon.png'); fs.copyFileSync('build/tray-icon.png','dist/main/desktop/build/tray-icon.png'); } if(fs.existsSync('build/icon.png')){ fs.copyFileSync('build/icon.png','dist/main/desktop/build/icon.png'); }"
scripts.pack:dir: npm run build:icon && npm run build:clean && electron-builder --dir --config electron-builder.json -c.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
scripts.pack:release: npm run build:icon && npm run build:clean && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json -c.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
scripts.postinstall: cd node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npx prebuild-install --runtime electron --target $(node -e "console.log(require('electron/package.json').version)") || true
